spec.description: Number of partitions which are at their minimum in sync replica count (| ISR | == | min.insync.replicas |)

spec.description: Number of partitions which are under their minimum in sync replica count (| ISR | < | min.insync.replicas |)

spec.description: Number of under-replicated partitions (| ISR | < | all replicas |).
spec.title: Under Replicated Partitions

spec.description: Number of partitions that don’t have an active leader and are hence not writable or readable
spec.title: Offline Partitions Count

spec.description: Number of active controllers in the cluster
spec.title: Active Controllers

spec.description: Average percentage of time network processor is idle
spec.title: Network Processor Avg Idle Percent

spec.description: Average percentage of time request handler threads are idle
spec.title: Request Handler Avg Idle Percent
